shotList: 1) MCU Radioman at post tapping out message on telegraph keys, crewman is in partial silhouette. F2) CU Down over man"s right hand tapping out message on telegraph key. F3) CU Over right shoulder of pilot, controls and windshield in BG. G4) CU Pilot, co-pilot and chief engineer, who is seated in FG in cockpit of P-3A in flight, many switches seen overhead above chief engineer"s head. VG5) CU Pilot at controls of P-3A, in flight. G6) CU Through window, two starb"d engine propellers spinning in FG, water below. G7) CU Operator seated before ASW Detection Gear, second man at right. (SV) G8) HA CU Operator of SA-16 plotting on detection gear as he sits before his scope. G9) CU Over left shoulder of operator, SA-16, plotting on detection gear, scope shows various patterns, operator makes marks on scope. G10) CU Navigator at his station in P-3A. (SV) F11) HA CU Navigator at station in P-3A, navigator is making some adjustments on gear above him, then continues working on paper work with compass. G12) MS JULIE ECM Gear and Radar MAD Gear in P-3A, with operators, right BG is rather dark.13) CU Operator working on JULIE ECM Gear; MAD Gear operator partially seen in BG. (SV) G14) HA CU Operator seated before radar for MAD Gear. (Flat and underexposed). F to P15) HA MCU Radio operator at his station with phones, hand on telegraph key; Officer comes into scene from right, talks with radio operator for moment, radio operator removes his phones, Officer then leaves. VG16) CU Down over telegragh key, radio operator knocking out message on key. (SV) VG17) CU Radio operator seated before teletyper, man dons his head gear, begins typing on teletyper on incoming message. VG18) HA CU Radio operator hanging up phones, making some adjustments on radio gear, begins tapping out message on telegraph key. G
title: DATA COMPUTERS AND ASW
